name: Raspberry-Cranberry Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fresh or frozen unsweetened raspberries (thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, bring cranberries and apple juice to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
3. Press the cranberry mixture through a sieve; return to the pan.
4. Press the raspberries through the sieve; discard skins and seeds.
5. Add to the cranberry mixture; bring to a boil.
6. Add sugar, lemon juice, and cinnamon; remove from heat.
7. Cool for 4 minutes.
8. Stir 1 cup of the half and half into 1 1/2 cups of raspberries.
9. Return all to the pan; bring to a gentle boil.
10. Mix cornstarch with remaining half and half; stir into soup.
11. Cook and stir for 2 minutes.
12. Serve hot or chilled, garnished with whipped cream and raspberries if desired.
